title: Curio Enchantment
description: A mod that can enchant curios。And it will automatically try to be compatible with other mods
body:
A mod that can enchant curios.

You can directly enchant in the Enchan table.

Suggest using it together with the Iron spells Book.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e353bb223b582badde27b2895f73c417a6a667ae_0.webp)


Key Information for Modpack Developers Regarding Curio Enchantment Integration:

Adding Items to curio_enchantment:curios_enchantable: Items added to this tag will become enchantable with generic curio enchantments.

Removing Items from curio_enchantment:curios_enchantable: Items removed from this tag will not accept generic curio enchantments.

Adding Enchantments to Type-Specific Tags (curio_enchantment:<curio_type>+_enchantable): Enchantments added to a tag like curio_enchantment:spellbook_enchantable will only be applicable to that specific type of curio (e.g., spellbooks).

Automatic Compatibility: This mod automatically adds curio item types from other mods to the curio_enchantment:curios_enchantable tag during tag loading for broader compatibility.

Do NOT confuse curio_enchantment:curios_enchantable (the tag name) with curio_enchantment:curio_enchantable (a likely typo)! They refer to different things.
